mapping.a_element: market price relaxing over time toward the lower asteroid-mining cost (final state)
mapping.b_element: two-level system thermalising toward a non-canonical steady state

brief_justification: Paper A is a non-steady economic system-dynamics simulation of PGM supply/price driven by a supply-shift off-world, whereas paper B is a quantum-optical GKLS/Lindblad master equation for a two-level system strongly coupled to a bath; the only overlap is the generic notion of a system relaxing toward a final state, and there is no role-for-role correspondence between the economic supply/price variables and the master equation's coupling constants and detailed-balance parameters, so they do not share transferable machinery.
